violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the milk cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/1900

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
The floor in the front area/service area is in poor repair missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Kitchen grout is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

Hash browns potatoes were observed held at 71 degrees Fahrenheit stored over preparation unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food item was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by fruit/drain flies (in front/service-preparation area and 3 bay sink area) and roaches (back/mop sink area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Copy of pest control assessment required by food inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Standing water was observed under the 2-door reach-in refrigeration unit at the service area. Pictures taken. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Dry racks located in the preparation area were observed rusty and not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
Plumbing below the mop sink is in poor repair. Water observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen/back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
- The wall next to employee bathroom is in poor repair. - The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

The floor in the front area/service area is in poor repair missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. - Wall behind ice holder (service area) is in poor repair. - Wall and floor under hand sink at the service area was observed with an accumulation of mold. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The floor in the kitchen area under 3 bay sink, grease trap, behind stove, oven, ice machine, refrigeration units have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
